stemHtml: Which statement about the duration of daylight is true?

options.a: Close to the equinoxes the influence of latitude on the duration of daylight is at its smallest.
options.b: Close to the solstices the influence of latitude on the duration of daylight is at its smallest.
options.c: On September 10th the duration of daylight is longer on the Southern Hemisphere than on the Northern Hemisphere.
options.d: In summer the length of the period of daylight decreases with increasing latitude.
